replies.msg:
[Internship] MTR - Tourist Ambassador

Job Duties:
To provide face-to-face assistance to passengers at stations such as but not limited to answer passengers’ enquiries on fare/ticketing, hereby tourist attractions and the proper ways to use the MTR system. All TAs are required to wear uniform (provided by MTR) while on duty.

Working Hours:
The TAs will work on duty roster for 5 hours per day and 3 days per week. Students will work on either shift: 10:00 -15:00 or 15:00- 20:00. You may also be required to work on Saturdays, Sundays and public holidays. Each Ambassador should work for 150 hours.



Working Location:

Each ambassador will work at one assigned station (i.e. Admiralty, Wan Chai, Hong Kong,

Tsim Sha Tsui, Central, Causeway Bay, Hung Hom, Lo Wu, Ocean Park)



Allowance:

HK$61/hour
Each ambassador will be entitled to free travel on MTR employment. Temp octopus card will be issued for free travel on the whole MTR network (excluding Airport Express, first class compartment of East Rail Line, Lo Wu and Lok Ma Chau unless students are assigned to those stations).



Requirements:

- Energetic, friendly and responsible.

- Proficient in Cantonese, English and Putonghua, knowledge in other languages will be an advantage

- Hong Kong permanent residence with age over 18
